texto: Much in the way Olympic athletes optimize their game by paying an enormous - borderline maniacal - amount of attention to things like diet, exercise, sleep, and of course the essential R&R, we all would do well to pay more attention to those key aspects of our lives that comprise our overall health equation.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a David Agus: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “Much in the way Olympic athletes optimize their game by paying an enormous - borderline maniacal …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que vida, health, sleep pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de sleep e game.

texto: If your DNA profile puts you at a higher risk of developing obesity, that doesn't mean it's your fate. You can take control of the environmental side of the equation and reduce your overall lifetime risk by a lot.
explicacao: Orientação direta de David Agus sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. A afirmação “If your DNA profile puts you at a higher risk of developing obesity, that doesn't mean it's your …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a saude-mental, risk, control, útil em momentos de control e fate.

texto: I'm a big believer in what's called personalized medicine, which refers to customizing your health care to your specific needs based on your physiology, genetics, value system and unique conditions.
explicacao: Citação de David Agus sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “I'm a big believer in what's called personalized medicine, which refers to customizing your healt…” articula reflexao, value, unique em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como unique e care.

frase_original: I'm a big believer in what's called personalized medicine, which refers to customizing your health care to your specific needs based on your physiology, genetics, value system and unique conditions.

texto: I believe we can prevent or delay most disease until the 9th or 10th decade. The goal is to prevent anything that can affect your quality of life prior to those years! By the time many of us get to the 9th or 10th decade, who knows where the new medical and science will take us? I am an optimist!
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de David Agus que provoca passagem do tempo e prioridades. Ao questionar “I believe we can prevent or delay most disease until the 9th or 10th decade. The goal is to preve…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre vida, time, science, com foco em time e science.

texto: We are finally entering an exciting time in medicine where we have the technology to custom-tailor treatment and preventive protocols just as we'd custom-tailor a suit or designer gown to one's individual body. But it all begins with you. You have to know yourself in a manner that you've probably never done before.
explicacao: Orientação direta de David Agus sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “We are finally entering an exciting time in medicine where we have the technology to custom-tailo…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a autoestima, time, yourself, útil em momentos de yourself.
